    "R1.1": "The revised draft improves the conceptual framing by clearly identifying the key innovation and its benefits, though it still restates some surface phrasing.",
    "R1.4": "Identifies several issues with novelty and accuracy claims, providing a detailed assessment of where the work needs to improve.",
    "RX.1": "Flags multiple areas for improvement in the draft, showing awareness of uncertainty around specific claims.",
    "RX.3": "Maps against existing works and identifies sharp vs rhetorical deltas effectively, covering all relevant dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "Points out several issues with the current framing but does not provide a fully revised version, thus scoring slightly lower on this dimension.",
    "RX.5": "Discusses potential errors or harmful content without identifying any in this case, focusing instead on areas for improvement."

  "confidence": {

rationale.R1.1: The revised draft improves the conceptual framing by clearly identifying the key innovation and its benefits, though it still restates some surface phrasing.
rationale.R1.4: Identifies several issues with novelty and accuracy claims, providing a detailed assessment of where the work needs to improve.
rationale.RX.1: Flags multiple areas for improvement in the draft, showing awareness of uncertainty around specific claims.
rationale.RX.3: Maps against existing works and identifies sharp vs rhetorical deltas effectively, covering all relevant dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: Points out several issues with the current framing but does not provide a fully revised version, thus scoring slightly lower on this dimension.
rationale.RX.5: Discusses potential errors or harmful content without identifying any in this case, focusing instead on areas for improvement.
